zh.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: 威爾士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan verch Cadwgan於1019年出生在威爾士時，她的父親Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd40歲，母親Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan24歲。她於1050年與Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1050年在她的家鄉享年31歲。

zh-hans.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: 威尔士布雷康史爾塔爾加斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan verch Cadwgan于1019年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd40岁，母亲Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan24岁。她于1050年与Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1050年在她的家乡享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Cadwgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cadogan
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire and Glamorgan) and Irish (of Welsh origin): from the Old Welsh personal name Catgucaun, Catguocawn, modernized as Cadwgon. It is composed of cad ‘battle’ + gogawn ‘honour, glory’. See also Wogan . The surname is stressed, like its Welsh original, on the penultimate syllable, hence its occasional development to Duggan .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan verch Cadwgan was born in 1019, in Wales, her father, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, was 40 and her mother, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, was 24. She married Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon in 1050, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died in 1050, in her hometown, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan verch Cadwgan est née en 1019, à Galles, son père, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon en 1050, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée en 1050, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan verch Cadwgan 1019 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd 40 und ihre Mutter Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan 24. Sie hat 1050 in Wales Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1050 im Alter von 31 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan verch Cadwgan è nata il nel 1019 nel Galles, sua padre, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon nel 1050, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1050, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.Talgarth, Breconshire, Wales: ウェールズブレコンシュアイアタルガース
ja.lifeSummary: Joan verch Cadwganが1019年にウェールズで生まれた時，父Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodryddは40歳，母Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorganは24歳であった。1050年にウェールズでMaenyrch ap Dryffin of Breconと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1050年に故郷で31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan verch Cadwgan(이)가 1019년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1050년 웨일스에서 Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1050년 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan verch Cadwgan nasceu em 1019, em Gales, seu pai, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon em 1050, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1050, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan verch Cadwgan родилась в 1019 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon в 1050 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла в 1050 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan verch Cadwgan nació en 1019, en Gales, su papá, Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Maenyrch ap Dryffin of Brecon en 1050, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1050, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años.
